signals.description: No code obfuscation or evasion techniques detected
No access to credential files, SSH keys, or token stores
Extension activates only on specific events, not wildcard

risk_classification.summary: Moderate capabilities detected. Extension uses some sensitive APIs but no strong indicators of malicious intent.
